title_en: The Audit Gate — Cardano's 2026 Budget Vote Closes as Risk Assets Bounce, but Execution Moves to Verification
title_ja: 監査ゲート — Cardano 2026 予算投票が閉じ、リスク資産は反発するが、実行は検証へ移る
executive_summary_en:
W24 is best read as **the audit-gate week**. The market recovered from W23's violent crypto sell-off, but Cardano's most important development was not price. It was process: the 2026 budget voting phase closed on the Hydra Voting platform with **more than 5B ADA of voting power, roughly 85% of active DRep stake, and 100+ DReps participating**. That is a major legitimacy signal for Voltaire. It is also not a final budget verdict. The correct next step is the independent audit window scheduled for **2026-06-15 to 2026-06-19**, followed by integration and preparation for on-chain submission.

The tape improved, but it did not become clean risk-on. From the W23 reference snapshot to W24, **BTC rose +3.5%, ETH +5.1%, and ADA +6.6%**, while ADA's 24h change at the W24 capture was +6.84%. Yet the S&P 500 fell -2.5% week-over-week, the VIX rose from 15.4 to 19.44, USDJPY stayed near 160, and oil reversed lower as the Iran story moved from headline agreement to condition verification. Crypto bounced; macro risk was still live.

Under the price action, Cardano's execution layer kept moving. The IOR proposal for the Cardano Vision 2026 was ratified with a **74.96% confidence vote**. Essential Cardano's 2026-06-12 development report highlighted a beta property-based testing tool from High Assurance and Mithril work on a **SNARK-friendly genesis certificate**, DMQ support, and Cardano-node ledger-state certification. The Constitutional Committee election also became a live governance watch: four seats become vacant in September, only four candidates were registered in the report window, and the candidate deadline is **2026-06-21**.

Regulation was constructive but unfinished. Senator Lummis framed CLARITY as the work of turning existing rules into law, while Japan's FSA published the promulgation and public-comment result for amendments to bank-law cabinet-office ordinances. These are rails, not a price catalyst. Midnight, meanwhile, shifted from W23's developer-and-agent layer toward community expansion: Japan's Nightforce Cohort 5 opened, while NIGHT bounced 24h but remained lower week-over-week versus W23's reference price. The honest reading is the same as before: attention is present, usage proof is still the conversion test.

The W24 conclusion is therefore narrower and more useful than "risk-on returned." **The market recovered enough to stop the W23 panic, but the investment clock moved to verification.** Next week has two hard gates: the budget audit window and the 2026-06-16/17 FOMC. For Cardano, the watch is whether a high-participation off-chain vote becomes a clean audited package ready for on-chain governance. For markets, the watch is whether a crypto bounce can survive VIX near 20, USDJPY near 160, and unresolved geopolitical conditions.
executive_summary_ja:
W24 は、**監査ゲートの週**として読むのが最も正確である。市場は W23 の激しい暗号資産売りから反発したが、Cardano にとって最重要の進展は価格ではなくプロセスだった。2026 年予算の投票フェーズは Hydra Voting 上で完了し、**5B ADA 超の投票力、active DRep stake の約 85%、100 名超の DRep 参加**を記録した。これは Voltaire にとって大きな正統性のシグナルである。ただし、これは最終的な予算結果ではない。正しい次の段階は **2026-06-15 から 2026-06-19** に予定される独立監査であり、その後に統合とオンチェーン提出準備が続く。

相場は改善したが、きれいな risk-on には戻っていない。W23 基準スナップショットから W24 までに **BTC は +3.5%、ETH は +5.1%、ADA は +6.6%** 上昇し、W24 取得時点の ADA 24h 変化率は +6.84% だった。一方で S&P 500 は前週比 -2.5%、VIX は 15.4 から 19.44 へ上昇し、USDJPY は 160 近辺に残り、Iran については「合意」見出しから条件検証へ移ったことで原油は反落した。暗号資産は反発したが、マクロリスクは生きている。

価格の裏側で、Cardano の実行レイヤーは前進を続けた。Cardano Vision 2026 に関する IOR 提案は **74.96% の confidence vote** で批准された。Essential Cardano の 2026-06-12 開発レポートは、High Assurance による property-based testing tool の beta、Mithril の **SNARK-friendly genesis certificate**、DMQ support、Cardano-node ledger-state certification の進捗を示した。Constitutional Committee 選挙も注視点となった。9 月に 4 議席が空席となる一方、レポート時点の候補者登録は 4 名のみで、候補者締切は **2026-06-21** である。

規制は建設的だが未完である。Lummis 上院議員は CLARITY を、既に存在するルールを法律へ変える作業として位置づけた。日本の金融庁は銀行法施行規則等の一部改正に関する公布とパブリックコメント結果を公表した。これらはレールであって、単独の価格カタリストではない。Midnight は、W23 の開発者・エージェント層からコミュニティ拡張へ進み、日本の Nightforce Cohort 5 募集が始まった。ただし NIGHT は 24h では反発しつつも、W23 基準価格との比較では前週比で低い。正直な読みは従来どおりだ。注目は存在するが、利用の証明が転換テストである。

したがって W24 の結論は、「risk-on が戻った」というより狭く、より実用的である。**市場は W23 のパニックを止めるだけの反発を見せたが、投資の時計は検証へ移った。** 来週のハードゲートは二つ、予算監査ウィンドウと 2026-06-16/17 の FOMC である。Cardano では、高参加率のオフチェーン投票が、監査済みのオンチェーン提出パッケージへきれいに変換されるかを確認する週になる。市場では、VIX 20 近辺、USDJPY 160 近辺、未解決の地政学条件の中で、暗号資産の反発が持続するかを見る週になる。

ticker_extras.night_note: 24h bounce but lower versus W23 reference; attention remains present, usage data still the conversion test.
ticker_extras.market_regime: Risk rebound inside unresolved macro: crypto recovered, VIX remained higher week-over-week, USDJPY stayed near 160, and oil fell as Iran terms moved to condition verification.

cardano_budget_2026.hydra_voting_status: voting phase complete; independent audit next
cardano_budget_2026.caution: do not treat the voting phase as a final budget result until audit/integration and on-chain submission are complete

ior_cardano_vision_2026.source: Essential Cardano weekly development report as of 2026-06-12 / IO Research

essential_cardano_2026_06_12.high_assurance: beta property-based testing tool finalized for internal testing; testing interface, positive/negative testing, threat models, coverage and VS Code extension work continued
essential_cardano_2026_06_12.mithril: SNARK-friendly genesis certificate implemented; continued recursive-circuit refactoring, prover input, SNARK proof verification, DMQ ledger peer support, message ID enforcement and Cardano-node ledger-state certification prototype
essential_cardano_2026_06_12.voltaire: call for more Constitutional Committee candidates; four seats become vacant in September, only four candidates registered in report window, deadline 2026-06-21

midnight.status: community expansion continues; no new City V2 usage data claim in this issue

clarity_act.status_w24: Senator Lummis framed CLARITY as turning existing rules into law with developer certainty, investor protection and market integrity

fsa_japan.title: Promulgation and public-comment result for amendments to Cabinet Office Orders including the Banking Act Enforcement Regulation
fsa_japan.source: Financial Services Agency Japan official page

ticker_extras.iran_condition_verification: reported agreement terms moved into verification and counter-messaging; watch signing, joint statement, Strait/oil/shipping-insurance conditions rather than treating the deal as complete

sipo.source: carried from W23 Koios/adastat capture; refresh recommended before any DRep-specific publication outside this brief

four_panel_summary.governance: Governance moved from headline voting to verification. The 2026 budget Hydra Voting phase closed with more than 5B ADA, about 85% active DRep stake and 100+ DReps, but the correct state is audit next, not final result. IOR/CV26 was ratified with 74.96% confidence, while the Constitutional Committee candidate deadline on 2026-06-21 became a live watch.
four_panel_summary.governance_ja: ガバナンスは、見出しとしての投票から検証へ移った。2026 年予算の Hydra Voting は 5B ADA 超、active DRep stake 約 85%、100 名超の DRep 参加で投票フェーズを完了したが、正しい状態は「結果確定」ではなく「次は監査」である。IOR/CV26 は 74.96% の confidence で批准され、Constitutional Committee 候補者締切 2026-06-21 が注視点となった。
four_panel_summary.defi: Institutional and regulatory rails continued to matter more than immediate TVL. Crypto bounced, but the macro tape was mixed: SPX lower W-o-W, VIX near 20, USDJPY near 160 and oil lower as Iran moved to condition verification. CLARITY and Japan FSA bank-rule updates are rails, not instant catalysts.
four_panel_summary.defi_ja: 機関・規制レールは、短期 TVL より重要な論点であり続けた。暗号資産は反発したが、マクロの地合いは混在した。SPX は前週比で低下し、VIX は 20 近辺、USDJPY は 160 近辺、Iran が条件検証へ移ったことで原油は下落した。CLARITY と日本の金融庁による銀行規則更新は、即時カタリストではなくレールである。
four_panel_summary.midnight: Midnight shifted toward contributor expansion. Nightforce Cohort 5 opened in Japan, extending the developer/community funnel from W23. NIGHT bounced 24h but remained lower W-o-W, so the honest frame is unchanged: attention exists, usage proof is still required.
four_panel_summary.midnight_ja: Midnight は貢献者拡張へ向かった。日本で Nightforce Cohort 5 の募集が始まり、W23 の開発者・コミュニティ導線を広げた。NIGHT は 24h で反発したが前週比では低く、正直なフレームは不変である。注目はあるが、利用の証明がまだ必要だ。
four_panel_summary.risk: Overall MEDIUM →. The crypto panic eased, but verification risk rose: budget audit, FOMC, USDJPY near 160, VIX higher W-o-W and Iran-condition uncertainty. Architecture risk stayed LOW → because High Assurance and Mithril progressed, but governance cannot be called complete before audit.
four_panel_summary.risk_ja: 総合 MEDIUM →。暗号資産のパニックは和らいだが、検証リスクは上がった。予算監査、FOMC、160 近辺の USDJPY、前週比で高い VIX、Iran 条件の不確実性が残る。High Assurance と Mithril が前進したためアーキテクチャリスクは LOW → だが、監査前にガバナンス完了とは呼べない。

data_sources.yields: SITION/Yahoo Finance ^TNX plus FRED indicators through 2026-06-11

data_sources.ior_cardano_vision_2026: Essential Cardano / IO Research note in 2026-06-12 development report; 74.96% confidence vote
data_sources.clarity_act: @SenLummis official X posts; treated as messaging/status, not enactment
data_sources.midnight: @midnight_jpn Nightforce Cohort 5 announcement; no new usage data claim made
data_sources.iran: SITION/SDE monitored official and market commentary; treated as condition-verification, not completed agreement
